reports.ocr_snippet:
Patient: Riya Sharma
Hemoglobin: 9.8 g/dL (Low)
Serum Iron: 42 µg/dL (Low)
Diagnosis: Iron deficiency anaemia

ai_summary.summary:
**Iron Deficiency Anaemia Detected**

Your CBC report shows low hemoglobin (9.8 g/dL) and serum iron (42 µg/dL), indicating iron deficiency anaemia. This can cause fatigue, weakness, and increased infection risk.

**Recommendations:**
- Increase iron-rich foods (spinach, lentils, red meat)
- Consider iron supplements after consulting your doctor
- Monitor symptoms and follow up in 4-6 weeks

**Citations:** Based on your lab values from CBC_Report_Jan2026.pdf.

reports.ocr_snippet:
Patient: Riya Sharma
Total Cholesterol: 220 mg/dL (High)
LDL: 138 mg/dL (High)
HDL: 45 mg/dL
Triglycerides: 150 mg/dL

ai_summary.summary:
**Elevated Cholesterol Levels**

Your lipid panel indicates high total cholesterol (220 mg/dL) and LDL (138 mg/dL), increasing cardiovascular risk.

**Recommendations:**
- Adopt heart-healthy diet (reduce saturated fats)
- Increase physical activity
- Consult cardiologist for possible medication

**Citations:** Based on Lipid_Panel_Mar2026.pdf values.

alerts.title: High AQI + Anaemia Risk
alerts.description: Chennai AQI at 145 (unhealthy) combined with low Hb 9.8 g/dL increases infection risk.

alerts.title: Heatwave + Poor Sleep
alerts.description: Chennai temperature 35°C + sleep <5.8 hrs/day may worsen fatigue.
